display_text: Blade Mail, Cost: 2300: Instantly returns all incoming damage for 5.5 seconds, increasing the percentage by 85%. Also passively returns 10 damage plus 15% of received attack damage. Effective for punishing focus fire. Stats: CD: 25s, Mana Cost: 25, Damage Return: 85% Active / 15% Passive.

display_text: Blade Mail, Cost: 2300: Situational defensive counter-item against high-damage burst heroes. The active ability forces enemies to reconsider targeting the wielder, allowing melee initiators or durable cores to survive and turn fights. It is especially effective versus heroes reliant on high-damage, single-target abilities.

display_text: Blade Mail, Cost: 2300: Synergizes with heroes who have high effective health pools or innate damage reduction. Heroes like Axe, Centaur Warrunner, or Bristleback can survive the initial damage burst and reflect significant damage back. Timing is key for punishing enemy initiation and reversing focus.

display_text: Blade Mail, Cost: 2300: A critical team fight role item that punishes focused damage. Activating it during key enemy spells or right-click volleys can disrupt enemy coordination and protect high-value allies. Its presence alters enemy targeting priorities.
